actionUnits.condition: Simulate continuous water hits calling Fire.WaterHit(Vector3) through the IWaterInteractable pipeline (BoxCollider present, no Rigidbody). Ensure each hit occurs within maxHitInterval=2s until currentHitTime >= totalHitTime=5s so fire turns off (isOn=false) and UpdateFireState(true) is invoked internally to stop particles and notify neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1). Script: Fire (MonoBehaviour m_Script guid=1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, mainEffectGo fileID=1849464941111748095). No UnityEvent m_Calls available on this component.

Neighbor-ignition timing test: Raise onNeighbors to meet/exceed onNeighborsThreshold=2 via neighbor fires within maxNeighborDistance=4 so CheckNeighborState() sets shouldTurnOn=true. Then wait until timeToOn elapses (Awake will randomize timeToOn between timeToOnMin=40 and timeToOnMax=60). Expect isOn to become true and UpdateFireState(true) to start particles and notify neighbors and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(1). Requires known neighbor Fire instances or NotifyNeighborState(true) calls from neighbors. No UnityEvent m_Calls are defined, so this relies on scene neighbor configuration.
